title: "I'm done with the abuse": QTCinderella threatens legal action against “hate farming” clip accounts after emotional return online
summary_full: Popular Twitch streamer QTCinderella has announced plans to take legal action against clip accounts that allegedly use her stream content to spread harassment and misleading narratives. Returning online after grieving the loss of her dog Swift, she said she would issue DMCA takedowns against malicious reposts. The move comes amid growing concerns over “clip farming” on social media, where creators’ content is repackaged with misleading context to generate engagement and fuel online hate campaigns.
